creator: ultima@freebsd.org
text:
I noticed options_single is being used for X11 and SHLIB, was this a mistake? This allows for only one or the other option being selected. Can X11 and SHLIB both not be enabled or disabled at the same time?

The USE_* is now a valid portlint item, Start this section with defining USES, and then possible USE_x.(13.1.7)[1]

[1] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/porting-samplem.html#porting-samplem-order
